import React from "react"; import { useCart } from "../context/CartContext"; import { Link } from "react-router-dom"; import Footer from "./Footer"; const Cart = () => { const { cartItems, removeFromCart, updateQuantity, clearCart } = useCart(); const getTotalPrice = () => { return cartItems.reduce((total, item) => total + item.product.price * item.quantity, 0); }; return (

Your Cart

{cartItems.length === 0 ? (

Your cart is empty.

Continue Shopping
) : (
{cartItems.map((item) => ( ))}
Product Quantity Price Total

{item.product.name}

{item.product.category?.name}

{item.quantity}
${item.product.price} ${(item.product.price * item.quantity).toFixed(2)}

Order Summary

Subtotal ${getTotalPrice().toFixed(2)}
Shipping $20.00
Taxes $5.00
Total ${(getTotalPrice() + 20 + 5).toFixed(2)}
)}
); }; export default Cart;
